title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Royal Enfield

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Royal Enfield
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Royal Enfield in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Royal Enfield:
Royal Enfield is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
